entities.name: positions.py
entities.context: Python script at N5/scripts/positions.py for managing positions in V's knowledge system — supports creating, extending, and connecting positions

entities.name: N5
entities.context: V's personal knowledge/operating system infrastructure, housing scripts and configurations

entities.name: Positions System
entities.context: A structured system for tracking V's beliefs and claims with stability levels, confidence scores, evidence, and inter-position connections

entities.name: Stability Levels
entities.context: Three-tier classification for positions: emerging (new), stable (well-supported), canonical (foundational)

entities.name: Confidence Scale
entities.context: 1-5 numeric scale for rating certainty of positions, from hypothesis (1) to certain (5)

entities.name: suggest-connections
entities.context: Subcommand of positions.py that analyzes a position and suggests relationships to other positions

entities.name: Position Connections
entities.context: Typed relationships between positions: supports, extends, contradicts, prerequisite, implies

relationships.context: positions.py lives within the N5 scripts directory as part of V's knowledge infrastructure
positions.py is the CLI tool that implements the Positions System
Stability levels are a core metadata dimension of every position
Confidence scores are a core metadata dimension of every position
Connections between positions form the graph structure of the system
suggest-connections is a subcommand within positions.py for discovering inter-position relationships
